overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic noir city waterfront during a stormy night. The camera moves along a curved cobblestone terrace past guards with glowing green accents, revealing an art deco metropolis across the dark ocean waters. The scene features high-quality game engine graphics with dramatic lighting and atmospheric rain effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered terrace walkway adjacent to cylindrical building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the curved terrace pathway beside the ocean

notable_agents.action: standing guard holding a tall staff, wearing black robes with glowing green patterns
standing guard facing the water, wearing black robes with glowing green patterns

entered.detail: large curved art deco building with vertical glass windows and concrete base
dark churning water with whitecaps visible under stormy skies
curved walkway with hexagonal stone tiles and small planted areas
distant illuminated aircraft hovering over the water
descending curved walkway wrapping around the building exterior

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stormy waterfront terrace beside a massive cylindrical building. Two guards in black robes with glowing green accents stand sentinel as the camera moves forward along the cobblestone path. The ocean churns in the background beneath a dark sky, with a distant airship visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront promenade with panoramic city views

events.description: panning left reveals the full art deco cityscape across the stormy water

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved path while turning to observe the cityscape across the water

entered.detail: tall illuminated building with vertical windows and glowing signage on the waterfront
docks and platforms visible at the water level below the terrace
ornate metal safety railing along the curved edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving past the guards, the view opens to reveal a magnificent art deco cityscape across the stormy water. The camera continues along the curved terrace, with the cylindrical building now at mid-distance on the right and the illuminated waterfront towers dominating the left side of the frame. Rain falls steadily as the path curves along the building's exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: high elevated walkway overlooking harbor waters

events.description: camera tilts downward to focus on the churning water and submerged structures below

agents.ego_description: walking slowly while looking down at the water and lower harbor levels

entered.detail: wreckage and structures visible beneath the surface of the dark water

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the curved path, now tilting downward to reveal the churning harbor waters far below. The cylindrical building recedes into the distance while the view focuses on submerged wreckage and the lower dock structures. The stormy water dominates the foreground as the walkway curves along the building's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a stormy waterfront terrace that shifts from a guarded entrance to a sweeping vista of a futuristic cityscape and its churning harbor. It begins beside a massive cylindrical building where two guards in black robes with glowing green accents stand sentinel along a cobblestone path. As the camera moves past the guards, the view opens to reveal a magnificent art deco metropolis across the dark, rain-swept ocean, with the cylindrical structure receding to the right. The scene then shifts as the camera continues along the curved terrace, eventually tilting downward to focus on the harbor waters far below. Finally, the view settles on submerged wreckage and lower dock structures as the stormy water dominates the foreground.
